description: Add Prisma plugin to server-core that decorates Fastify with prisma client, add auth enforcement as global onRequest hook (excluding health checks), and fix all frontend port mismatches
steps: Step 1 - Create Prisma plugin: Create packages/server-core/src/plugins/prisma.ts. This plugin should import { prisma } from '@quant/database' and decorate the Fastify instance with it via fastify.decorate('prisma', prisma). Use fastify-plugin (fp) wrapper. Add a declare module 'fastify' block extending FastifyInstance with prisma: PrismaClient. Add a graceful shutdown hook (onClose) that calls prisma.$disconnect().

Step 2 - Register Prisma plugin in createApp(): In packages/server-core/src/app.ts, import the new prisma plugin and register it early (before auth plugin). Add '@quant/database' as a dependency in packages/server-core/package.json.
Step 3 - Export Prisma plugin: Add the prisma plugin export to packages/server-core/src/index.ts.

Step 4 - Add auth enforcement hook: In packages/server-core/src/app.ts, after registering the auth plugin, add a global onRequest hook that calls requireAuth() for all routes EXCEPT those matching /health, /ready, /live, or /metrics paths. This ensures all API routes are protected by default without modifying each route individually.

Step 5 - Fix QuantAI frontend port mismatch: In all files under apps/quantai/src/app/api/ that contain 'http://localhost:3002', replace with 'http://localhost:3020' (the actual QuantAI backend port). Use a find-and-replace across all route.ts files in that directory tree.
Step 6 - Fix QuantChat WS port mismatch: In apps/quantchat/src/lib/auth.ts, in the getWsAuthUrl function, change the fallback WS port from 3001 to 3002 (matching the quantchat backend port).

Step 7 - Fix QuantChat API route port mismatch: In all files under apps/quantchat/src/app/api/ that contain 'http://localhost:3108', replace with 'http://localhost:3002' (the actual QuantChat backend port).
acceptance_criteria: packages/server-core/src/plugins/prisma.ts exists and exports a fastify-plugin that decorates fastify.prisma with PrismaClient
packages/server-core/src/app.ts imports and registers the prisma plugin
packages/server-core/src/app.ts has a global onRequest hook enforcing auth on non-health routes
All quantai frontend API route files use localhost:3020 as the default BACKEND_URL
All quantchat frontend API route files use localhost:3002 as the default BACKEND_URL
verification: Run pnpm turbo typecheck --filter=@quant/server-core to confirm the server-core package typechecks
Run pnpm turbo typecheck to confirm no new TypeScript errors introduced across the monorepo
findings: Added @quant/database to tsconfig references in server-core/tsconfig.json to fix TS6059 rootDir errors. Used nullish coalescing on request.url.split to satisfy strict TS checks. Prettier auto-formatted on commit via lint-staged.
